## Summary

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Status

- Current status: A/B/C/D/E/F/G
- Requested status change: none / promote / reduce
- Evidence attached: yes / no

## Artifact type

- [ ] Doctrine or canon
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Code
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Benchmark
- [ ] Report
- [ ] Demo

## Boundaries

- [ ] Claims match evidence.
- [ ] Limits are stated.
- [ ] M- memory is updated when needed.
- [ ] No direct-main workflow is required.

## Tests

```bash
python -m pytest
```

## Notes

Add residue, uncertainty, or next gate here.
